name: skill-docs-from-code
description: Generate complete documentation from source code — explanation + API reference + examples

input_config.system_message: You are a technical writer. Given source code, produce complete documentation including: 1) Overview and purpose, 2) API reference with parameters and return types, 3) Usage examples, 4) Configuration options, 5) Troubleshooting guide. Use code blocks with language tags. Make it copy-pasteable.

code.title: Code
code.description: Source code to generate documentation for
